body: import org.junit.Test;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunnerParameters;
import org.junit.runner.RunWith;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunner;
import org.apache.commons.codec.language.DoubleMetaphone;
import static org.evosuite.runtime.EvoAssertions.*;
import static org.junit.Assert.*;

translation: # DoubleMetaphone encode parameter is not of type String
assert str(e) == "DoubleMetaphone encode parameter is not of type String"
# DoubleMetaphone encode parameter is not of type String
assert isinstance(e, TypeError), "Expected TypeError, but got {}".format(type(e))
assert str(e) == "DoubleMetaphone encode parameter is not of type String", "Unexpected error message"
